title: Orthiopteris acuminata
taxonomy: Orthiopteris acuminata is classified within the plant kingdom as a species of fern. Specifically, it belongs to the division Pteridophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. Within the class Polypodiopsida, it is further classified as an order Polypodiales and a family Dryopteridaceae. The genus Orthiopteris is a small group of ferns, with Orthiopteris acuminata being one of its species. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and anatomical characteristics.
